ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare record */,
  "stop1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first stop in the route */,
  "stop2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second stop in the route */,
  "current_fare" TEXT /* Current fare charged between the two stops */,
  "fixed_fare_zones" TEXT /* Fixed fare zones between the stops */,
  "distance_miles" TEXT /* Distance in miles between the stops */,
  "price_per_mile" TEXT /* Price per mile for the current fare */,
  "peak_fare" TEXT /* Fare charged during peak hours */,
  "off_peak_fare" TEXT /* Fare charged during off-peak hours */,
  "special_event_fare" TEXT /* Fare charged during special events */,
  "holiday_fare" TEXT /* Fare charged during holidays */,
  "reduced_fare" TEXT /* Reduced fare for students, seniors, and disabled passengers */,
  "fare_type" TEXT /* Type of fare (e.g., regular, peak, off-peak, special event, holiday, reduced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_stop2_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop2_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_stop1_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop1_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_fixed_fare_zones FOREIGN KEY ("fixed_fare_zones") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location details of the stop */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Fare zone ID for the stop */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the stop */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the stop */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of stop (e.g., bus stop, train station) */,
  "is_transfer_point" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stop is a transfer point */,
  "transfer_rules" TEXT /* Rules for transferring at the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the fare zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fare zone */,
  "base_fare" TEXT /* Base fare for the zone */,
  "peak_base_fare" TEXT /* Base fare during peak hours */,
  "off_peak_base_fare" TEXT /* Base fare during off-peak hours */,
  "special_event_base_fare" TEXT /* Base fare during special events */,
  "holiday_base_fare" TEXT /* Base fare during holidays */,
  "reduced_base_fare" TEXT /* Reduced base fare for students, seniors, and disabled passengers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting stop for the route */,
  "end_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending stop for the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of transportation for the route (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "route_length_miles" TEXT /* Total length of the route in miles */,
  "average_travel_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Average travel time for the route in minutes */,
  "peak_travel_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Average travel time during peak hours */,
  "off_peak_travel_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Average travel time during off-peak hours */,
  "route_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of service (e.g., every 15 minutes, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_end_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_start_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare card */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the card */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance on the fare card */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date when the fare card was activated */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the fare card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of fare card (e.g., monthly pass, single trip) */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date when the card was last used */,
  "auto_reload" INTEGER /* Indicates if the card has auto-reload enabled */,
  "auto_reload_amount" TEXT /* Amount to be auto-reloaded */,
  "reload_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of auto-reload (e.g., monthly, weekly) */,
  "is_suspended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the card is suspended */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for suspension (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_cards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., passenger, conductor, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_student" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a student */,
  "is_senior" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a senior */,
  "is_disabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is disabled */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_stops" (
  "route_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "stop_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the stop in the route */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Expected arrival time at the stop */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Expected departure time from the stop */,
  "is_real_time_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if real-time tracking is enabled for the stop */,
  "real_time_data_source" TEXT /* Source of real-time data (e.g., GPS, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stops_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_fares" (
  "special_fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special fare */,
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fare record for the special fare */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the special fare period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the special fare period */,
  "fare_adjustment" TEXT /* Adjustment amount or percentage for the fare */,
  "fare_type" TEXT /* Type of special fare (e.g., peak, off-peak, special event, holiday, reduced) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the special fare is currently active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the special fare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("special_fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_fares_fare_id FOREIGN KEY ("fare_id") REFERENCES fares ("fare_id")
)
